title: skopeo-copy failing to use successful `podman login` creds
body:
```skopeo version 1.0.0
uname -a
Linux fedora.matthewbach.dev 5.6.18-200.fc31.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Jun 10 22:18:55 UTC 2020 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```


Example:
Succesful login with podman
```bash
podman login -u="workshop-admin" -p="<omitted>" quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com --tls-verify=false
WARNING! Using --password via the cli is insecure. Please consider using --password-stdin
Login Succeeded!

# Verify auth.json
cat $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/containers/auth.json{
        "auths": {
                "quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com": {
                        "auth": "omitted"
                },
                "registry.redhat.io": {
                        "auth": "omitted"
                }
        }
}

# push an image with podman
podman tag registry.redhat.io/ubi7/ubi quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com/mirroring-org/mirror-source

podman push quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com/mirroring-org/mirror-source --tls-verify=false
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 895d16eabfa1 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 933e707b3698 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 0.0b
Copying config d36cb7ab60 [======================================] 4.2KiB / 4.2KiB
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures

# attempt the same with skopeo
skopeo copy --dest-tls-verify=false containers-storage:registry.redhat.io/ubi7/ubi docker://quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com/mirroring-org/ubi-mirror

Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 933e707b3698 [--------------------------------------] 8.0b / 20.0KiB
FATA[0001] Error writing blob: Error initiating layer upload to /v2/mirroring-org/ubi-mirror/blobs/uploads/ in quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized 
ERRO[0001] exit status 1 

# explicitly calling the authfile
skopeo copy --authfile $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/containers/auth.json --dest-tls-verify=false containers-storage:registry.redhat.io/ubi7/ubi docker://quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com/mirroring-org/ubi-mirror
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 933e707b3698 [--------------------------------------] 8.0b / 20.0KiB
FATA[0001] Error writing blob: Error initiating layer upload to /v2/mirroring-org/ubi-mirror/blobs/uploads/ in quay.apps.cluster-vabeach-e196.vabeach-e196.example.opentlc.com: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized 
ERRO[0001] exit status 1 
```

Additionally, I've tried logging in directly with skopeo login, but this yields the same result. Sidenote, the example for skopeo login in the README for this project states the flag is `--user`, but the man-doc shows it as `--username`

comments.body:
Thanks for your report. That’s fairly surprising. We did have inconsistencies in the file path between Podman and Skopeo, but that should be resolved in recent versions, and anyway explicit `--authfile` should rule that out.

Are the two repositories `mirroring-org/mirror-source` and `mirroring-org/ubi-mirror` configured exactly the same? Can you reproduce this using exactly the same image name for both Podman and Skopeo?

Can you collect the logs of failing `skopeo --debug copy …` and successful `podman --log-level=debug push …`, please?
Ah man, I mixed up the repos! :-p Closing this now, as I debugged myself right past the obvious.
